title: Boat Rental in Copenhagen: Your 2026 Guide to Choosing a Boat
html:
Copenhagen's network of canals and the Øresund Strait offer some of Scandinavia's finest boating. Whether you want to sail to Malmö or explore the inner harbour, you can rent a boat from €150 for a half-day. Depart from Sydhavn or Svanemøllehavnen and compare verified boat listings on BoatHire24, the worldwide marketplace for renting and listing boats.

How much does it cost to rent a boat in Copenhagen?

Prices range from €150 for a shared tour to €4,000 for a crewed yacht per day. A small motorboat half-day costs €250-€400, while a full-day catamaran is about €1,500-€2,500. The table below breaks down typical rates.

  • Shared canal tour: €50-€100 per person, 1-2 hours
  • Small motorboat (half-day, up to 8 guests): from €250
  • Catamaran (full-day, up to 12 guests): from €1,500
  • Crewed motor yacht (full-day, up to 10 guests): from €2,500

Where to set off in Copenhagen

Choose a departure point from one of these six real marinas and harbours. Sydhavn is ideal for quick access to the inner canals. Svanemøllehavnen, north of the city, offers direct Øresund routes. Tuborg Havn near Hellerup is a popular private marina. Dragør Havn, a southern fishing harbour, provides a 12-nautical-mile hop to the island of Saltholm. Christianshavn's canals weave through historic Nyhavn and the Opera House. Finally, Rungsted Havn north of the city is the gateway to the Danish Riviera.

Which boat to rent

Your choice depends on guest numbers, activity, and budget. Here is a ranked list of options.

  1. Motorboat (e.g., Axopar 28): best for day trips to Malmö or island hopping, up to 8 guests, from €400 half-day
  2. Sailing yacht (e.g., Jeanneau 53): best for a peaceful cruise, up to 10 guests, from €800 half-day
  3. Catamaran (e.g., Lagoon 450): best for stability and space, up to 12 guests, from €1,500 full-day
  4. Crewed motor yacht (e.g., Princess V58): best for luxury with a skipper, up to 10 guests, from €2,500 full-day. You can explore this motor yacht on BoatHire24 for details.
  5. RIB or speedboat: best for adrenaline and fishing, up to 6 guests, from €200 half-day

Do you need a licence to rent a boat in Copenhagen?

For most small motorboats and sailing yachts under 15 metres, an International Certificate of Competence (ICC) is required. However, many operators offer skippered charters, so no licence is needed if you hire a captain. The operator confirms exact requirements for each boat. For high-season (June to August), expect westerly winds (the prevailing 'Vestervind') and book well in advance.

For a calm day on the Øresund, rent early in the morning before the afternoon breeze picks up; you can anchor at Nordhavn for a swim.

At a glance

  • Price band: €50 per person shared tour to €4,000 per day crewed yacht
  • Peak months: June, July, August
  • Trip length: 1 hour shared tour to 8 hours full-day charter
  • Capacity: 2 to 12 guests
  • Currency: EUR
  • Distance: 12 nautical miles from Dragør to Saltholm

Questions about boat rental in Copenhagen

What is the best time of year to rent a boat in Copenhagen?

The best time is June through August when temperatures average 20°C and the days are long, with up to 17 hours of daylight in midsummer.

Can I rent a boat without a skipper in Copenhagen?

Yes, you can rent bareboat if you hold an ICC or equivalent licence, but many boats are also available with a skipper included in the price.

Are there any restrictions on where I can go from Copenhagen?

You can travel anywhere within Danish and Swedish waters, but you must stay within 12 nautical miles of the coast unless you have prior permission.

How far in advance should I book my boat rental in Copenhagen?

During peak season, booking at least two weeks ahead is recommended, with many boats reserved by early June.

Copenhagen in 2026 offers more rental options than ever, so plan your trip and browse the listings on BoatHire24 to find the perfect vessel. Whether you own a boat and want to earn income, you can also list your own on the marketplace. BoatHire24 makes it simple for owners to reach a worldwide audience.

Written by the BoatHire24 team, who book and list verified boats in Copenhagen and hundreds of destinations worldwide.
